title: Thinking and Doing Rhythm
html:
We think faster and more than what we can do.

Hence, thinking slower is more effective. Thinking ahead too much breaks the rhyme.

Thinking without acting is just imagination. Think-Act is inseparable. It is “agency unity.”

  • When thinking becomes the excuse

backlinks.title: When thinking becomes the excuse
backlinks.context: • Thinking and Doing Rhythm - The trap of information consumption without action
